calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Off Calendar

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendants Lewis Brothers' Construction, Inc. or Brendan Lewis.
Defaults were entered against defendants on September 3, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on September 3, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on September 22, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendants Lewis Brothers' Construction, Inc., and Brendan Lewis as follows:

Damages/Principal - $40,360.37.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,271.90.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $465.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $44,597.27.

It is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph 3 of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
